name: jambavan
description: Local-first MCP server for persistent coding-agent memory, codebase-aware context, failure history, review packs, prompt compression, and a local graph GUI.

plugins.name: jambavan
plugins.description: MCP server: persistent memory, AST-aware code index, token-budgeted context, failure history, review packs, prompt compression, and local graph GUI. Read-only by default; write/shell tools are opt-in.
